transcript: Speaker A: Oh sweet thinnu Pooja nange kelasa sikkide. Sambla eshtu gottha? 30,000. [Oh, eat this sweet Pooja, I got a job. Do you know how much the salary is? 30,000.] Speaker B: Sweet ella irli, modlu job heng sikthu adu helu. Ning English matadokku baralla, aadru hege? Nin ishtu bega English matadodu hege kalte? [Let the sweet be, first tell me how you got the job. You didn't even know how to speak English, then how? How did you learn to speak English so quickly?] Speaker A: Secret ide, aadre heltini. SpeakX app. [There is a secret, but I'll tell you. SpeakX app.] Speaker B: Yenu? SpeakX app? Idrinda hege kalte? [What? SpeakX app? How did you learn from this?] Speaker A: Ee app alli AI teacher irtare. Tumba easy aagi English kalistare. Chikka makkalu kuda pratidina 10 rinda 15 nimisha practice madidre saku, avru kuda 15 dinadalli English kalistare. [In this app, there are AI teachers. They teach English very easily. Even small kids just need to practice 10 to 15 minutes daily, they will also learn English in 15 days.] Speaker B: Houda, nijana? [Is it? Really?] Speaker A: Neevu time waste madta iddaaga naanu ee app alli practice madtidde. Heg gottha? Manager jothe English hege matadbeku, customer jothe deal hege madbeku, office friends jothe English hege matadbeku. Bari 15 dinadalli nanna English ishtu fluent aagutte anta naanu ankondiralilla. [While you were wasting time, I was practicing on this app. You know how? How to speak English with the manager, how to deal with customers, how to speak English with office friends. I never thought my English would become this fluent in just 15 days.] Speaker B: Naanu yella interviews allu reject aagtidini. Naanu nin tara ee app inda English matadodu kalibahuda? [I am getting rejected in all interviews. Can I also learn to speak English from this app like you?] Speaker A: Ivatthe SpeakX app download madu, English matadod kali, ningu kuda 100% job guarantee. [Download the SpeakX app today, learn to speak English, you will also get a 100% job guarantee.]

summary: A man shares his success of securing a high-paying job by improving his English speaking skills using the SpeakX app. His friend, who has been facing interview rejections, is inspired to download the app to practice daily scenarios with an AI mentor. The ad ends with a call to action to download the app and start a 7-day trial.
